text:
(In reply to Sebastian Meyer from comment #0)

The reason why emails addressed to me are not being delivered is because the sender's smtp does not speak IPv6.

1 Delete
2 Not written because net/py-trio is called from net/py-trio-websocket
3 Same reason as 2
